title: HSB +
description: HSB+ is a modpack designed for the hypixel skyblock, it contains some of the most useful mods that are available on modrinth and also contains a resource pack that you can use with your favorites ones and some custom menus !
body:
### ! READ BEFORE INSTALLING !
As skyblock mods are in constant evolution, I'm not gonna upload a pack version every days, so in order to keep the pack updated, you should unlink your instance once installed, so you can auto update the pack manually !

In order to unlink the instance : 
- Go on your modpack instance, then go in the settings
- Click on the "Installation" tab and select "Unlink instance"
- I encourage you to save your config folder

Most updates will just remove/add mods or change/improve the menus

### What is Hypixel Skyblock + ?

- HSB+ is a modpack with the **most useful mods** that are available on modrinth for the hypixel skyblock so you **no longer have to worry about malicious mods** you could install !
- QoL / Dungeons / Slayers mods etc... Everything you need for your journey on the skyblock
- Custom menus 
- Optimization mods that will let you enjoy the game without performance issue 

<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

**Hypixel mods**
- Skyhanni
- Skyblocker
- Skyblock Profile Viewer
- Aaron's Mod
- Firmament
- Devonian

**Optimization mods**
- Sodium

- Lithium

- FerriteCore

- Reese's Sodium Options

**Misc mods**

- Roughly Enough Items
- Mod Menu
- FancyMenu
- 3D Skin Layers
- Sound Controller
- Slaww View Model
- EMF
- ETF


</details>

<details>
<summary>Shaders</summary>

</details>

<details>

</details>
